title: SCP-001, The Gate Guardian
description: Do not approach the Gate Guardian. He's protecting the gate and will kill everything that approaches it...
body:
The Gate Guardian adds a new entity. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-001, also known as The Gate Guardian.


SCP-001 rarely spawns as part of a special structure in badlands or desert biomes. Floating above the ground and positioned before a mysterious Gate, the Gate Guardian serves as a Guardian. It reacts to player proximity with escalating warnings. Crossing into 80 blocks triggers SCP-001 to raise its sword, slam it into the ground, and instantly kill the player. All nearby entities vanish instantly, and strange particles swirl endlessly around it. There is no way to harm or bypass the Gate Guardian, only to obey its warnings.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-001 spawn?

SCP-001 can spawn in Deserts or Badlands as a Structure. However, there can only one instance of SCP-001

► Does the Gate function?

No the Gate that SCP-001 protects is part of the Entity Model to scale it up. The player can't enter this "Portal" since in Survival or Adventure Mode, the player wouldn't even get close to the portal. 

► Can I trigger SCP-001 by building a real Aether Portal?

No, the Aether Mod is a seperate mod, made by other developers. SCP-001 only protects the Gate he's spawning with, but doesnt get triggered by custom portals. If he would, switching to other dimensions wouldn't be possible anymore since he would kill every entity nearby.

</details>



![Gate Guardian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdace7fc5e8b5601590d77db2f4e83b124eb6c4c.png)

SCP-001, The Gate Guardian is an enormous, radiant figure that hovers motionless in front of a big Gate. Its immense size and constant glow make it visible from afar. The Guardian is indestructible and does not move, until someone dares to ignore its presence. At 120 blocks, it commands "LEAVE". At 100 blocks, it commands "YOU ARE NOT WELCOME". At 80 blocks, his final message appears "YOU SHALL NOT PASS". In that instant, the Guardian draws its colossal sword, slams it into the ground, and kills the player in a single strike. Every nearby entity vanishes in an instant, leaving only the gate and the Gate Guardian surrounded by its mysterious, constant particle aura.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
